payload.criterion: Tests cover: (a) repro of the inverse-direction trap that motivated the report; (b) happy path single --blocks; (c) repeatable + dedup; (d) mixed --blocks + --blocked-by; (e) error paths (not_found, ambiguous, self-loop, both-lists-share-id); (f) JSON envelope round-trip; (g) act ready correctly hides the existing target after the new issue lands.
